label: test: syntax check
command: bash -n scripts/*.sh src/main.sh src/lib/*.sh src/lib/core/*.sh src/lib/modules/*.sh tests/*.sh && echo SYNTAX_OK

label: test: shellcheck
command: shellcheck scripts/*.sh src/main.sh src/lib/*.sh src/lib/core/*.sh src/lib/modules/*.sh tests/*.sh

label: test: run all tests
command: for t in tests/*.sh; do bash $t >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo PASS: $t || echo FAIL: $t; done

label: qemu: sanity check
command: cp build.conf.example build.conf && ./scripts/package.sh && echo TESTS && for t in tests/*.sh; do bash $t >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo FAIL: $t; done && ./dist/bin/rpi5-archlinux-image validate && echo SANITY_OK

label: qemu: run
command: sudo pkill -f qemu-system 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ./dist/bin/rpi5-archlinux-image qemu-run 2>&1 | tee qemu-boot.log

label: qemu: verify boot log
command: echo BUILD_ERRORS=$(grep -c '\[FAIL\]' build-qemu.log) && grep 'Finished Complete first boot' qemu-boot.log && echo BOOT_ERRORS=$(grep -c 'FAILED' qemu-boot.log)

label: full cycle: package → qemu → verify
command: cp build.conf.example build.conf && ./scripts/package.sh && rm -f dist/images/archlinux-qemu-aarch64.img && echo BUILDING && ./dist/bin/rpi5-archlinux-image build-qemu 2>&1 | tee build-qemu.log && sudo pkill -f qemu-system 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ./dist/bin/rpi5-archlinux-image qemu-run 2>&1 | tee qemu-boot.log &

label: git: commit and push to dev
command: git add -A && GIT_EDITOR=true git commit && git branch -f dev main && git push origin dev --force

label: git: push to dev
command: git branch -f dev main && git push origin dev --force
